item.title: 软银支持的PayPay在8.8亿美元IPO后股价上涨19%
item.description: PayPay公司股票周四在美股首日交易中飙升19%，此前这家数字支付企业以8.798亿美元完成首次公开募股（IPO），创下日本企业十年内登陆美国股市的最大规模上市纪录。【原文：Shares of PayPay Corp. jumped 19% in its trading debut Thursday after the digital payments firm’s $879.8 million US IPO, the biggest listing for a Japanese company on a US stock exchange in a decade.】

item.title: 备受好评的希尔顿黑德岛拟发行3500万美元债券用于消防总部建设
item.description: 希尔顿黑德岛——这座位于南卡罗来纳州外海的历史名岛，以高尔夫运动和12英里长的海滨而闻名——正通过发行市政债券筹集资金，用于建造新的消防员总部。【原文：Hilton Head, a historic island off of South Carolina known for its golfing and 12-mile beachfront, is tapping the municipal bond market to fund a new headquarters for firefighters.】

item.title: 施罗德出售业务为富国银行等银行带来8300万英镑手续费
item.description: 富国银行、巴克莱银行和摩根大通将因参与英国资产管理公司施罗德的出售工作，分享总额8300万英镑（约合1.108亿美元）的佣金。【原文：Wells Fargo & Co., Barclays Plc and JPMorgan Chase & Co. will split £83 million ($110.8 million) in fees for their work on the sale of UK asset manager Schroders Plc.】

item.title: CF工业公司股价创历史新高，因伊朗战争风险升温
item.description: 随着中东冲突升级威胁全球氮基作物营养素供应，化肥市场正趋紧，推动全球最大氨生产商CF工业控股公司等企业受益。【原文：Fertilizer markets are tightening as the escalating conflict in the Middle East threatens global supplies of nitrogen-based crop nutrients, boosting companies such as CF Industries Holdings Inc., the world’s largest producer of ammonia.】

item.title: 谢恩鲍姆承诺在选举改革失败后再次尝试
item.description: 墨西哥总统克劳迪娅·谢恩鲍姆在宪法修正案未能获得通过所需票数、遭遇其执政以来的首次立法挫折后不到24小时，便提出了一项改革选举制度的备选方案。【原文：President Claudia Sheinbaum offered a back up plan to reform Mexican elections less than 24 hours after a constitutional overhaul failed to win the votes needed for passage and marking her first legislative setback.】

item.title: 特朗普与伊朗态度强硬，油市难见缓解
item.description: 在战争第13天，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普与伊朗新任最高领袖均采取强硬姿态，尽管美国正加紧努力抑制油价，但布伦特原油价格仍一度突破每桶100美元，能源市场未见明显缓解。【原文：President Donald Trump and Iran’s new supreme leader both struck defiant tones on the 13th day of the war, offering little relief to energy markets as Brent crude briefly topped $100 barrel despite fresh US efforts to curb oil prices.】

item.title: 斯洛伐克最大化肥厂因天然气价格飙升减产
item.description: 斯洛伐克最大化肥生产商表示，由于天然气价格飙升，该公司正削减氨产量。这再次表明，中东冲突正开始冲击欧洲化工行业。【原文：Slovakia’s largest fertilizer producer said it’s curbing ammonia output after natural gas prices surged, in another sign that the Middle East conflict is starting to hit the industry in Europe.】

item.title: 美国盟友在中国周边地区如坐针毡，因武器从亚洲转向伊朗
item.description: 2010年，当美国为支援阿富汗军事行动而撤出其在亚洲唯一部署的航母时，该地区盟友几乎不担心中国或朝鲜可能趁机得利。如今形势已然不同。【原文：When the US pulled its only aircraft carrier based in Asia to support the military surge in Afghanistan back in 2010, allies in the region had little concern that China or North Korea might look to take advantage. Today things are different.】

item.title: 亚马逊抓住短暂窗口期发行540亿美元全球债券
item.description: 随着伊朗局势升级，本周银行发售了价值540亿美元的亚马逊公司债券，其销售策略清晰明确：在这个日益不可预测的世界里，该公司是稳妥的投资选择。【原文：The banks selling $54 billion of Amazon.com Inc. bonds this week as the war in Iran intensified settled on a clear sales pitch: the company is a safe bet in a world that’s becoming less predictable.】

item.title: 斯特赖克攻击采用伊朗关联黑客长期使用的战术
item.description: 本周，医疗技术公司史赛克（Stryker Corp.）的部分员工在登录工作电脑时遭遇了异常情况：他们面对的竟是一个陌生的黑白卡通形象——某个神秘亲伊朗黑客组织的标志。【原文：While struggling to log into their work computers this week, some employees of the medical technology company Stryker Corp., were met by an unfamiliar black-and-white cartoon figure: the logo of a shadowy pro-Iranian hacking group.】

item.title: 欧洲物价冲击距2022年能源危机仍相去甚远
item.description: 欧洲央行正面临战争引发新一轮通胀的威胁，但其深知此次情况可能有所不同，且自身应对能力更强。【原文：The European Central Bank is confronting the threat of another bout of war-induced inflation in the knowledge that this time is probably different, and it’s better positioned to respond.】

item.title: 斯特赖克运输公司船只遭袭事件仍在调查中，伊朗亲政府组织宣称对此负责
item.description: 针对史赛克公司的网络攻击已导致这家医疗技术企业的订购和运输系统持续离线，该公司仍在努力应对此次致命黑客攻击——该攻击据称由一个与伊朗有关联的组织所为。【原文：A cyberattack on Stryker Corp. has kept the medical technology company’s ordering and shipping systems offline as the firm continues to struggle to address a crippling hack claimed by a group linked to Iran.】

item.title: 由奥泽尔和道格·金管理的对冲基金在商品市场动荡中获利
item.description: 由罗恩·奥泽、道格·金以及前千禧管理公司高级投资组合经理史蒂夫·巴克利管理的对冲基金，上周在伊朗战争引发的大宗商品价格波动中斩获收益，而许多规模更大的同行却蒙受了损失。【原文：Hedge funds managed by Ron Ozer, Doug King and former Millennium Management senior portfolio manager Steve Barclay are the latest to have notched gains last week from the commodities volatility in the wake of the Iran war, even as many larger peers suffered losses.】

item.title: 伊朗战争引发通胀风险，抵押贷款利率创11个月来最大涨幅
item.description: 美国抵押贷款利率创近一年来最大涨幅，因与伊朗的战争加剧通胀担忧，为即将到来的春季销售季增添不确定性。【原文：Mortgage rates in the US jumped by the most in almost a year as inflation fears stoked by the war with Iran added uncertainty for the upcoming spring sales season.】

item.title: 每加仑5美元的取暖油抵达美国，成为伊朗战争引发的最新燃油痛点
item.description: 美国住宅取暖油价格飙升至每加仑5美元以上，创2022年11月以来新高。伊朗局势紧张导致全球柴油和原油供应紧张，而这两类燃料对家庭取暖至关重要。【原文：US residential heating oil prices surged above $5 a gallon, the highest since November 2022, as the war in Iran strains global diesel and crude flows critical for home heating.】

item.title: 蒂凯豪的梅耶-莱维表示，私募信贷已变得"过于嘈杂"
item.description: 蒂凯豪资本私募债务部门主管塞西尔·梅耶-莱维将当前私募信贷市场的动荡比作被困在想离开却无法脱身的场合。【原文：Tikehau Capital private debt head Cécile Mayer-Lévi compared the current turmoil on the private credit market to getting stuck at an event you want to leave but can’t.】

item.title: 戴尔称企业无权指示政府如何使用其技术
item.description: 戴尔科技公司首席执行官迈克尔·戴尔在回应关于Anthropic PBC与美国国防部纠纷的问题时表示，与政府开展业务的公司不能告诉政府机构如何使用其技术。【原文：Dell Technologies Inc. Chief Executive Officer Michael Dell said that a company doing business with the government can’t tell agencies how to use its technology, responding to a question about Anthropic PBC’s feud with the US Defense Department.】

item.title: 私募信贷的"反向杠杆"成为基金新痛点
item.description: 私募信贷基金在遭遇前所未有的投资者撤资潮和众多借款人违约的双重压力下已处于守势，如今正准备与它们的首选贷款方——大型银行展开对抗。【原文：Private credit funds, already on the defensive amid an unprecedented investor exodus and a number of defaulting borrowers, are now bracing for a battle with their go-to lenders: major banks.】

item.title: 华尔街"缓冲"ETF面临考验，战争加剧市场波动
item.description: 债券在履行其关键职能之一——缓冲股票损失方面屡屡失效。华尔街已注意到这一现象，并正力推替代方案：一种规模达800亿美元的股票基金类别，旨在提供美国国债可能无法再可靠提供的下行保护。【原文：Bonds keep failing at one of their key jobs — cushioning stock losses. Wall Street has noticed, and it’s pushing an alternative: an $80 billion category of equity funds designed to provide the downside protection Treasuries may no longer reliably deliver.】

item.title: 标普称人工智能对软件行业的影响不会引发大规模降级潮
item.description: 标普全球评级表示，人工智能对软件行业的影响不会严重到引发全行业信用评级下调的浪潮。【原文：The impact of artificial intelligence on the software industry will not be severe enough to cause a sector wide wave of credit rating downgrades, S&P Global Ratings said.】

item.title: 赖特称对油轮错误帖子承担“全部责任”
item.description: 美国能源部长克里斯·赖特表示，他为一条引发市场恐慌、导致油价暴跌的错误社交媒体帖子承担"全部责任"。该帖子错误暗示美国海军护送油轮通过战略要冲霍尔木兹海峡，数分钟后即被删除。【原文：US Energy Secretary Chris Wright said he took “full ownership” for an erroneous social media post that rattled traders and sent oil prices reeling after it wrongly suggested the US Navy had escorted an oil tanker through the vital Strait of Hormuz. The post was deleted minutes later.】

item.title: 哥伦比亚总统候选人瓦伦西亚任命奥维耶多为竞选搭档
item.description: 哥伦比亚总统候选人帕洛玛·瓦伦西亚任命前国家统计局局长胡安·丹尼尔·奥维耶多为其竞选搭档。【原文：Colombian presidential candidate Paloma Valencia appointed Juan Daniel Oviedo, a former head of the national statistics agency, as her running mate.】

item.title: Stellantis考虑与中国竞争对手达成交易以巩固欧洲市场
item.description: 知情人士透露，Stellantis NV正与多家中国汽车制造商洽谈合作，这些企业将投资菲亚特母公司陷入困境的欧洲业务，而Stellantis自身则将投资重心转向美洲市场。【原文：Stellantis NV is exploring deals with Chinese carmakers through which they would invest in the Fiat owner’s struggling European operations, as the company focuses its own investments on the Americas, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 交易员不再完全预期美联储今年降息
item.description: 债券交易员不再完全预期美联储将在2026年降息。【原文：Bond traders ceased to fully price in that the Federal Reserve will lower interest rates in 2026.】

item.title: 微软办公软件主管拉杰什·贾宣布退休
item.description: 微软公司一位长期负责办公应用程序和Windows操作系统的资深高管即将退休。【原文：A long-tenured Microsoft Corp. executive that oversaw workplace applications and the Windows operating system is retiring.】

item.title: 非洲最大服装零售商Pepkor寻求财务主管，计划筹建银行
item.description: 佩普科尔控股有限公司正物色银行主管人选。这家非洲最大的服装和手机销售商计划利用其在南非的门店网络开设分支机构，以覆盖数百万低收入客户。【原文：Pepkor Holdings Ltd. is seeking a banking chief as Africa’s biggest seller of clothing and mobile phones plans to open branches using its store network in South Africa to reach millions of lower-income customers.】

item.title: 鲍曼称美联储将于下周公布银行资本计划
item.description: 美联储首席银行监管官员周四表示，美国贷款机构将在未来一周收到监管机构提出的新资本方案。【原文：US lenders are poised to see new capital proposals from regulators in the coming week, the Federal Reserve’s top bank cop said Thursday.】

item.title: 帕兰蒂尔在与五角大楼争执后寻求拓展安普瑞克之外的业务
item.description: 在Anthropic PBC与五角大楼的争端中，Palantir Technologies Inc.可能转向其他人工智能模型。【原文：Palantir Technologies Inc. may turn to other AI models amid the spat between Anthropic PBC and the Pentagon.】

item.title: 英国称伊朗可能在霍尔木兹海峡开采矿产，哈梅内伊正收紧对海峡的控制
item.description: 英国称，伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的迹象日益明显。伊朗新任最高领袖首次接受媒体采访时表示，这条关键水道应当保持关闭状态。【原文：It’s becoming increasingly evident that Iran is laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz, according to the UK, as Iran’s new supreme leader used his first comments to the media to say the critical waterway should stay closed.】

item.title: Rivian更实惠车型即将亮相，定价57,990美元
item.description: 电动汽车消费者至少要等到2027年，Rivian汽车公司才会推出售价低于5万美元的SUV车型。【原文：Electric-vehicle shoppers will have to wait until at least 2027 for Rivian Automotive Inc. to sell an SUV for less than $50,000.】
